courseTitle: Game Feel, UI, Audio, and Visual Communication
title: Access Kitchen
genericDescription: Audit barriers; design options for diverse players; evaluate whether an accessibility feature changes the core challenge appropriately.
specificDescription: A cooking microgame with live toggles for captions, high contrast, slow mode, larger text, simplified motion, remap hinting, and difficulty assist.
gradingRubric: 30 pts quality of accessibility improvements; 20 pts preservation of core design; 20 pts implementation completeness; 15 pts before/after evidence; 15 pts audit rationale.
